description: Semantic/AST-based prevention rules for complex regression detection

rules.name: Unhandled promise rejection
rules.suggestion: Add .catch() handler or use try/catch with async/await

rules.name: Resource leak - unclosed file
rules.message: File opened without context manager (with statement)
rules.suggestion: Use 'with open(...) as f:' pattern to ensure file is closed

rules.name: Godot: @onready reference to missing node
rules.message: @onready reference to node that doesn't exist in scene tree
rules.suggestion: Verify node path matches scene tree structure

rules.name: React: useEffect missing dependency
rules.message: useEffect has missing or incorrect dependencies
rules.suggestion: Add all referenced variables to the dependency array

rules.name: Go: defer in loop
rules.message: defer in loop — deferred calls won't run until function returns, may leak resources
rules.suggestion: Wrap loop body in a function or call .Close() directly

rules.name: Rust: unreachable pattern in match
rules.message: Match arm is unreachable due to earlier pattern
rules.suggestion: Reorder match arms or remove redundant pattern

rules.name: Godot: Signal connection to non-existent method
rules.message: Signal connected to method that doesn't exist in the target script
rules.suggestion: Add the method or fix the signal connection path

rules.name: Python: Function with too many arguments
rules.message: Function has more than 7 arguments — consider using a dataclass or config object
rules.suggestion: Group related arguments into a dataclass or TypedDict

rules.name: TypeScript: useState with any
rules.suggestion: Define a proper type: useState<User | null>(null)
